axisId.description: The id of the axis used for the reference value.

classes.description: Override or extend the styles applied to the component.

label.description: The label to display along the reference line.

labelAlign.description: The alignment if the label is in the chart drawing area.

labelStyle.description: The style applied to the label.

lineStyle.description: The style applied to the line.

spacing.description: Additional space around the label in px. Can be a number or an object { x, y } to distinguish space with the reference line and space with axes.

x.description:
The x value associated with the reference line.
If defined the reference line will be vertical.

y.description:
The y value associated with the reference line.
If defined the reference line will be horizontal.

vertical.nodeName: the root element if the reference line is vertical

horizontal.nodeName: the root element if the reference line is horizontal
